title: Turnstile Stripes
lore: Justin Tiger sampled a turnstile in triple time and dressed it in tiger-stripe funk — cardio playlists adopted it before he finished the mix.
artistPersona: Jazztronica and funky commute music — pop hooks so sticky the turnstile beeps in harmony. Still instrumental; no celebrity faces.
albumConcept: Justin Tiger's jazztronica commute — tiger-stripe funk over pop-sized hooks, pocket so deep the turnstile nods along.
